description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push to master and pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: build-linux, build-windows, and build-appimage. The build-linux job runs on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-20.04, building the project with different compilers and configurations. The build-windows job runs on windows-latest, setting up a MinGW environment and building the project with different configurations. The build-appimage job runs on ubuntu-20.04, building the project and creating an AppImage.
